  <script>
    (function () {
      try {
        var body = document.body || document.documentElement;
        var root = document.documentElement;
        var savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('PRIME_NET_UI_V1_theme');
        var savedColor = localStorage.getItem('colorTheme');
        var savedAppConfig = localStorage.getItem('appConfig');
        var colorFromConfig = '';

        if (savedAppConfig) {
          try {
            colorFromConfig = JSON.parse(savedAppConfig)?.colorTheme || '';
          } catch (e) {}
        }

        var initialColor = savedColor || colorFromConfig || 'blue';

        root.classList.add('preload');
        if (document.body) document.body.classList.add('preload');

        if (savedTheme === 'dark') {
          body.classList.add('dark-theme');
          body.classList.remove('light-theme');
          body.dataset.theme = 'dark';
        } else if (savedTheme === 'light') {
          body.classList.add('light-theme');
          body.classList.remove('dark-theme');
          body.dataset.theme = 'light';
        }

        body.setAttribute('data-color-theme', initialColor);
      } catch (e) {}
    })();
  </script>

        body {
            font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
            background-color: var(--body-bg);
            color: var(--primary-text);
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 16px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            height: 100vh;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            --power-btn-bg: #ffffff; 
            --power-btn-bg-hover: #f0f0f0;
            --success-color: var(--accent-color); 
            --success-color-rgb: var(--accent-color-rgb); 
        }

        body.navbar-open .phone-mockup {
            filter: blur(0.5px);
            transition: filter 0.3s ease;
        }

        .phone-mockup {
            width: 100vw;
            height: 100vh;
            height: 100dvh;
            background-color: var(--phone-bg);
            border-radius: 40px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            padding: 20px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: filter 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
        }

        .phone-mockup::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background-image: var(--main-bg-image);
            background-size: cover;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
            background-position: center var(--main-bg-position-y, 180px);
            background-attachment: fixed;
            background-size: cover;
            opacity: var(--world-map-opacity);
            z-index: 1;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        header,
        .notification,
        .server-select,
        main {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
            padding: 0 10px;
        }

        header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding-top: 20px;
            padding-bottom: 10px;
        }

        header h1 {
            font-family: "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif;
            font-size: 28px;
            margin: 0;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            flex-grow: 1;
            text-align: center;
            filter: brightness(1.1);
            color: var(--primary-text);
        }

        header h1 .kanji {
            color: var(--accent-color);
        }

        header .boost {
            color: var(--boost-color);
            font-size: 18px;
            margin-left: 8px;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }

        header .fa-bars {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: var(--secondary-text);
        }

        header .fa-user {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: var(--secondary-text);
        }

        .notification {
            background: var(--notification-bg);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 12px 15px;
            margin: 20px 0;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px var(--notification-shadow);
        }

        .notification p {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        .server-select {
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            border: 1px solid var(--server-select-border);
            background-color: rgba(var(--body-bg-rgb), 0.3);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 12px 15px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04) !important;
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
        }

        .server-info {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .server-info img {
            width: 35px;
            height: auto;
            margin-right: 15px;
        }

        .server-info div {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .server-info span {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--primary-text);
        }

        .server-info small {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: var(--secondary-text);
        }

        .fa-chevron-down {
            color: var(--secondary-text);
        }

        .server-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
        }

        .server-action-icon {
            color: var(--secondary-text);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
            margin-right: 4px;
            stroke-width: 1.5;
            position: relative;
        }

        .server-action-icon:hover {
            color: var(--accent-color);
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        .server-action-icon::after {
            content: "Auto Conexão";
            position: absolute;
            top: -30px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            background: rgba(var(--body-bg-rgb), 0.95);
            color: var(--primary-text);
            padding: 4px 8px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 12px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease, visibility 0.2s ease;
            pointer-events: none;
            border: 1px solid var(--server-select-border);
        }

        .server-action-icon:hover::after {
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
        }

        main {
            flex-grow: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            align-items: center;
        }

        main.connected-state .power-button-container {
            width: 140px !important;
            height: 140px !important;
        }

        main.connected-state .power-button {
            width: 140px !important;
            height: 140px !important;
        }

        .power-button-container {
            width: 140px;
            height: 140px;
            min-width: 140px;
            min-height: 140px;
            background-color: var(--power-btn-container-bg);
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            box-shadow: var(--power-btn-container-shadow);
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            margin-top: 50px;
            transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease, border 0.3s ease;
            border: 12px solid transparent;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .power-button {
            width: 140px;
            height: 140px;
            min-width: 140px;
            min-height: 140px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background-color: var(--power-btn-bg);
            border: none;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out;
            box-shadow: var(--power-btn-shadow);
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .power-button svg{
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .power-icon{
            width: 75px;
            height: 75px;
            color: var(--power-icon-hover-color);
            display: block;
            transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out;
            filter:
                drop-shadow(0 0 7px rgba(var(--power-icon-hover),0.7))
                drop-shadow(0 0 16px rgba(var(--power-icon-hover),0.45))
                drop-shadow(0 0 36px rgba(var(--accent-color-rgb),0.25));
            }

        body.dark-theme .power-icon{
            filter:
               drop-shadow(0 4px 7px rgba(0,0,0,0.34))
               drop-shadow(0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04))
               drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(var(--power-icon-hover), 0.18))
               drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(var(--power-icon-hover), 0.08));
        }

        .power-button .fa-power-off {
            font-size: 65px;
            color: var(--power-icon-hover-color);
            text-shadow: var(--power-icon-hover-shadow);
            transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
        }

        .connect-text {
            font-size: 18px;
            color: var(--secondary-text);
            font-weight: 600;
            transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1);
            padding: 10px 24px;
            border-radius: 50px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(var(--accent-color-rgb), 0.15);
            background-color: rgba(var(--body-bg-rgb), 0.3);
            backdrop-filter: blur(5px);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(5px);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            min-width: 200px;
            text-align: center;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            transform-style: preserve-3d;
            transform: translateZ(0);
        }

        .connect-text::before {
            content: "";
            position: absolute;
            left: -100%;
            top: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg,
                    rgba(var(--accent-color-rgb), 0) 0%,
                    rgba(var(--accent-color-rgb), 0.1) 50%,
                    rgba(var(--accent-color-rgb), 0) 100%);
            transition: left 0.7s ease;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .connect-text:hover::before {
            left: 100%;

                    <path d="M400 54.1c63 45 104 118.6 104 201.9 0 136.8-110.8 247.7-247.5 248C120 504.3 8.2 393 8 256.4 7.9 173.1 48.9 99.3 111.8 54.2c11.7-8.3 28-4.8 35 7.7L162.6 90c5.9 10.5 3.1 23.8-6.6 31-41.5 30.8-68 79.6-68 134.9-.1 92.3 74.5 168.1 168 168.1 91.6 0 168.6-74.2 168-169.1-.3-51.8-24.7-101.8-68.1-134-9.7-7.2-12.4-20.5-6.5-30.9l15.8-28.1c7-12.4 23.2-16.1 34.8-7.8zM296 264V24c0-13.3-10.7-24-24-24h-32c-13.3 0-24 10.7-24 24v240c0 13.3 10.7 24 24 24h32c13.3 0 24-10.7 24-24z"/>
                </svg>`;

                powerIcons.forEach(icon => {
                    icon.innerHTML = powerSvg;
                });
            });

            if (window.MutationObserver) {
                const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
                    mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
                        if (mutation.addedNodes && mutation.addedNodes.length > 0) {
                            for (let i = 0; i < mutation.addedNodes.length; i++) {
                                const node = mutation.addedNodes[i];
                                if (node.nodeType === 1) {
                                    if (node.classList && node.classList.contains('power-icon')) {
                                        node.innerHTML = powerSvg;
                                    } else {
                                        const icons = node.querySelectorAll('.fas.fa-power-off');
                                        if (icons.length) {
                                            icons.forEach(icon => {
                                                icon.innerHTML = powerSvg;
                                            });
                                        }
                                    }

                    });
                });

                observer.observe(document.documentElement, {
                    childList: true,
                    subtree: true
                });
            }

        (function initVersao() {
            const versionEl = document.getElementById("userversion");
            try {
                if (
                    window.DtAppVersion &&
                    typeof window?.DtAppVersion?.execute === "function"

                    const version = window?.DtAppVersion?.execute();
                    if (version) {
                        versionEl.innerText = `v${version}`;

                if (testIcon) {

    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const uuidInput = document.getElementById('uuid');
            if (!uuidInput) return;
            const savedUuid = window?.DtUuid?.get();

            if (savedUuid) {
                uuidInput.value = savedUuid;
            }

            uuidInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
                const uuid = uuidInput.value.trim();
                if (uuid) {
                    window?.DtUuid?.set(uuid);
                }
            });
        });

        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            function checkFontAwesome() {
                const testElement = document.createElement('i');
                testElement.className = 'fas fa-power-off';
                testElement.style.visibility = 'hidden';
                document.body.appendChild(testElement);

                const computedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(testElement, '::before');
                const isFontAwesomeLoaded = computedStyle.content !== 'none' &&
                    computedStyle.content !== '' &&
                    computedStyle.content !== 'normal';

                document.body.removeChild(testElement);
                return isFontAwesomeLoaded;
            }

            function activateFallback() {
                console.log('Font Awesome não carregou. Ativando fallback para ícones.');

                const fallbackStyle = document.getElementById('fa-fallback');
                if (fallbackStyle) {
                    fallbackStyle.innerHTML = `
                        .fa-power-off-fallback {
                            display: inline-block;
                            color: var(--power-icon-hover-color);
                            text-shadow: var(--power-icon-hover-shadow);
                        }
                        .power-icon {
                            display: none !important;
                        }
                    `;
                }
            }

            setTimeout(function() {
                if (!checkFontAwesome()) {
                    activateFallback();
                }
            }, 1000);

            window.addEventListener('load', function() {
                if (!checkFontAwesome()) {
                    activateFallback();
                }
            });
        });

        function normalizarNome(texto) {
            return texto.toLowerCase().normalize("NFD").replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "").replace(/[^a-z]/g, "");
        }

        function detectarOperadora(nomeConfig) {
            const nome = normalizarNome(nomeConfig);
            if (nome.startsWith("vivo") || nome.includes("vivo")) return "vivo";
            if (nome.startsWith("tim") || nome.includes("tim")) return "tim";
            if (nome.startsWith("claro") || nome.includes("claro")) return "claro";
            if (nome.startsWith("inter") || nome.includes("inter")) return "inter";
            return null;
        }

        function aplicarTema(tema) {
            if (!tema) return;
            document.body.setAttribute("data-color-theme", tema);
            document.querySelectorAll(".theme-swatch").forEach(swatch => {
                swatch.classList.toggle("active", swatch.dataset.theme === tema);
            });
        }

        function aplicarTemaPorConfig(nomeConfig) {
            if (!nomeConfig) return;
            const operadora = detectarOperadora(nomeConfig);
            if (!operadora) return;
            const mapaTema = {
                tim: "blue",
                vivo: "purple",
                claro: "red",
                inter: "orange"
            };
            const tema = mapaTema[operadora];
            if (!tema) return;
            aplicarTema(tema);
            localStorage.setItem("appConfig", JSON.stringify({
                nomeConfig,
                operadora,
                colorTheme: tema,
                savedAt: Date.now()
            }));
        }

        document.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
            const item = e.target.closest(".bg-config");
            if (!item) return;
            const nomeConfig = item
                .querySelector(".config-name")
                ?.innerText
                ?.trim();
            if (!nomeConfig) return;
            aplicarTemaPorConfig(nomeConfig);
        });

        window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
            const saved = localStorage.getItem("appConfig");
            if (!saved) return;
            try {
                const data = JSON.parse(saved);
                if (!data.colorTheme) return;
                aplicarTema(data.colorTheme);
            } catch (e) {
                console.warn("Erro ao restaurar tema salvo");
            }
        });

        const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
            const saved = localStorage.getItem("appConfig");
            if (!saved) return;
            const {
                colorTheme
            } = JSON.parse(saved);
            if (!colorTheme) return;
            if (document.body.getAttribute("data-color-theme") !== colorTheme) {
                aplicarTema(colorTheme);
            }
        });

        observer.observe(document.body, {
            attributes: true,
            attributeFilter: ["data-color-theme"]
        });
    </script>

        function normalizeVersion(version) {
            return String(version || '').trim().replace(/^v/i, '');
        }

        function compareVersions(v1, v2) {
            const parts1 = normalizeVersion(v1).split('.').map(Number);
            const parts2 = normalizeVersion(v2).split('.').map(Number);

            for (let i = 0; i < Math.max(parts1.length, parts2.length); i++) {
                const p1 = parts1[i] || 0;
                const p2 = parts2[i] || 0;

                if (p1 > p2) return 1;
                if (p1 < p2) return -1;
            }
            return 0;
        }

        function delay(ms) {
            return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
        }

        function getInstalledAppVersion() {
            try {
                if (typeof window?.DtAppVersion?.execute === 'function') {
                    return normalizeVersion(window.DtAppVersion.execute() || '0.0.0');
                }

                if (window?.sdk?.android?.getAppVersion) {
                    return normalizeVersion(window.sdk.android.getAppVersion() || '0.0.0');
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Erro ao obter versão instalada:', error);
            }
            return '0.0.0';
        }

        function getUpdateRemindLaterUntil() {
            const value = Number(localStorage.getItem(UPDATE_REMIND_LATER_KEY) || 0);
            return Number.isFinite(value) ? value : 0;
        }

        function clearUpdateRemindLater() {
            localStorage.removeItem(UPDATE_REMIND_LATER_KEY);
            if (updateReminderTimeout) {
                clearTimeout(updateReminderTimeout);
                updateReminderTimeout = null;
            }
        }

        function scheduleUpdateReminder() {
            if (updateReminderTimeout) {
                clearTimeout(updateReminderTimeout);
                updateReminderTimeout = null;
            }

            const remindAt = getUpdateRemindLaterUntil();
            const remaining = remindAt - Date.now();

            if (remaining > 0) {
                updateReminderTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    clearUpdateRemindLater();
                    checkAppUpdate(false);
                }, remaining);
            }
        }

        function postponeUpdateReminder() {
            const remindAt = Date.now() + UPDATE_REMIND_LATER_MS;
            localStorage.setItem(UPDATE_REMIND_LATER_KEY, String(remindAt));
            scheduleUpdateReminder();
            updateRequiredModal.hide();
            showToast('Lembrete da atualização adiado por 2 horas');
        }

        async function checkAppUpdate(showToastMessages = false) {
            try {
                const requiredVersion = normalizeVersion(APP_VERSION);
                let installedVersion = getInstalledAppVersion();

                console.log('Versão instalada:', installedVersion);
                console.log('Versão requerida:', requiredVersion);

                if (compareVersions(installedVersion, requiredVersion) === -1) {
                    if (showToastMessages) {
                        showToast('Verificando atualização...');
                    }

                    if (typeof window?.DtStartAppUpdate?.execute === 'function') {
                        try {
                            window.DtStartAppUpdate.execute();
                        } catch (e) {
                            console.warn('Falha ao iniciar atualização automática:', e);
                        }
                    }

                    await delay(4000);
                    installedVersion = getInstalledAppVersion();
                    console.log('Versão instalada após tentativa automática:', installedVersion);

                    if (compareVersions(installedVersion, requiredVersion) === -1) {
                        const currentVersionEl = document.querySelector('#updateRequiredModal .current-version');
                        const newVersionEl = document.querySelector('#updateRequiredModal .new-version');
                        const downloadBtn = document.getElementById('updateRequiredDownloadBtn');
                        const laterBtn = document.getElementById('updateRequiredLaterBtn');
                        const remindLaterUntil = getUpdateRemindLaterUntil();

                        if (currentVersionEl) {
                            currentVersionEl.textContent = `(${installedVersion})`;
                        }

                        if (newVersionEl) {
                            newVersionEl.textContent = "v" + requiredVersion;
                        }

                        if (downloadBtn) {
                            downloadBtn.textContent = `BAIXAR`;
                            downloadBtn.onclick = () => {
                                clearUpdateRemindLater();
                                if (typeof window?.DtOpenExternalUrl?.execute === 'function') {
                                    window.DtOpenExternalUrl.execute(APP_DOWNLOAD);
                                } else {
                                    window.location.href = APP_DOWNLOAD;
                                }
                            };
                        }

                        if (laterBtn) {
                            laterBtn.onclick = postponeUpdateReminder;
                        }

                        if (remindLaterUntil > Date.now()) {
                            scheduleUpdateReminder();
                            return;
                        }

                        clearUpdateRemindLater();
                        updateRequiredModal.show();
                    } else {
                        clearUpdateRemindLater();
                        if (showToastMessages) {
                            showToast('Aplicativo atualizado com sucesso');
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    clearUpdateRemindLater();
                    if (showToastMessages) {
                        showToast('Aplicativo já está atualizado');
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Erro ao verificar atualização:', error);
            }
        }

        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {

        function normalizeText(value) {
            if (value === null || value === undefined) return "";
            return String(value).trim();
        }

        function formatPing(value) {
            const raw = normalizeText(value);
            if (!raw) {
                return "N/D";
            }
            if (/^\d+(\.\d+)?$/.test(raw)) {
                return raw + " ms";
            }
            if (/^\d+(\.\d+)?ms$/i.test(raw)) {
                return raw.replace(/ms/i, " ms");
            }
            return raw;
        }

        const dtVpnStateListener = state => {
            const powerButton = document.querySelector('.power-button');
            const powerButtonContainer = document.querySelector('.power-button-container');
            const connectText = document.querySelector('.connect-text');
            const logsContainer = document.getElementById('main-screen-logs');
            const userInfoContainer = document.getElementById('user-info');
            const mainContainer = document.querySelector('main');
            const appVersion = document.querySelector('.app-version');
            if (!powerButton || !connectText || !logsContainer || !userInfoContainer || !mainContainer) return;

             syncNetInfo();
            
            powerButtonContainer.classList.remove('connecting', 'connected', 'auth-failed', 'no-network', 'stopping');
            connectText.classList.remove('connected-status');

            logsContainer.style.display = state === 'CONNECTING' || state === 'AUTH' ? 'block' : 'none';
            userInfoContainer.style.display = state === 'CONNECTED' ? 'block' : 'none';

            if (appVersion) {
                appVersion.style.display = state === 'CONNECTED' ? 'none' : 'block';
            }

            if (state === 'CONNECTED') {
                connectText.classList.remove('connecting-status');
                mainContainer.classList.add('connected-state');
            } else {
                mainContainer.classList.remove('connected-state');
            }

            switch (state) {
                case 'CONNECTED':
                    powerButtonContainer.classList.add('connected');
                    connectText.classList.add('connected-status');
                    connectText.textContent = `Conectado`;
                    checkUserReceived = false;
                    startCheckUserValidation();
                    updateSelectedServerInfo();
                    handleConnectedUUIDUI(selectedConfig);
                    saveUser();
                    updateUserInfo();

                    if (isAutoConnecting) {
                        const connectedConfig = autoConnectConfigs[currentConfigIndex];
                        addAutoConnectLog(`Conectado com sucesso em: ${connectedConfig.name}!`);
                        isAutoConnecting = false;
                        resetAutoConnectModal();
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            autoConnectModal.hide();
                        }, 2000);
                    }
                    break;
                case 'CONNECTING':
                    powerButtonContainer.classList.add('connecting');
                    connectText.textContent = 'Conectando...';
                    break;
                case 'AUTH':
                    powerButtonContainer.classList.add('connecting');
                    connectText.textContent = 'Autenticando...';
                    const hasSshCredentials = (dtGetUsername()?.trim() && dtGetPassword()?.trim());
                    const hasV2rayCredentials = dtGetUUID()?.trim();
                    if (!hasSshCredentials && !hasV2rayCredentials) {
                        authFailedModal.show();
                        return;
                    }
                    break;
                case 'STOPPING':
                    powerButtonContainer.classList.add('stopping');
                    connectText.textContent = 'Desconectando...';
                    break;
                case 'AUTH_FAILED':
                    authFailedModal.show();
                    powerButtonContainer.classList.add('auth-failed');
                    connectText.textContent = 'Erro de Autenticação';
                    if (isAutoConnecting) {
                        addAutoConnectLog("Falha na autenticação");
                        currentConfigIndex++;
                        authFailedModal.show();
                    }
                    break;
                case 'NO_NETWORK':
                    powerButtonContainer.classList.add('no-network');
                    connectText.textContent = 'ATIVE OS DADOS MOVEIS';
                    break;
                case 'DISCONNECTED':
                    localStorage.removeItem("checkUserData");
                    if (!disconnectByValidation && isAutoConnecting) {
                        if (connectionTimedOut) {
                            addAutoConnectLog(`Tempo esgotado. Tentando o próximo...`);
                        } else {
                            addAutoConnectLog("Falhou. Tentando próximo servidor...");
                        }
                        currentConfigIndex++;
                        setTimeout(tryNextConfig, 1000);
                    }
                    disconnectByValidation = false;
                    loginauth();
                default:
                    connectText.textContent = 'Pressione para conectar';
                    break;
            }
        };

        function updateHotspotStatus() {
            if (!hostshareUrl) {
                return;

            isHotspotActive = lastHotspotState === 'ACTIVE';

            const toggleHotspotButton = document.getElementById('toggleHotspotButton');
            if (toggleHotspotButton) {
                if (isHotspotActive) {
                    toggleHotspotButton.textContent = 'Parar';

                } else {
                    toggleHotspotButton.textContent = 'Ativar';
                    toggleHotspotButton.classList.remove('stopping');
                }
            }
        }
        
        window.onHotspotStateListener = (state) => {
            const newState = state.toUpperCase();
            
            if (newState === lastHotspotState) {
                return;
            }

            lastHotspotState = newState;

        function enableNativeLongPressMenu(selector) {
            const clearSelectionAndBlur = (input) => {
                try {
                    const end = (input.value || '').length;
                    if (typeof input.setSelectionRange === 'function') {
                        input.setSelectionRange(end, end);
                    }
                } catch (e) {}

                try { input.blur(); } catch (e) {}
            };

            document.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach((input) => {
                input.setAttribute('autocomplete', 'on');
                input.setAttribute('autocapitalize', 'off');
                input.setAttribute('spellcheck', 'false');
                input.removeAttribute('readonly');
                input.removeAttribute('disabled');

                                                
                const focusForEditing = () => {
                    try {
                        input.focus({ preventScroll: true });
                    } catch (e) {
                        try { input.focus(); } catch (_) {}
                    }
                };

                const forceNativeSelectionUI = () => {
                    try { input.click(); } catch (e) {}
                    try { input.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseup', { bubbles: true })); } catch (e) {}
                    try {
                } catch (e) {}
                };

                const clearOwnSelection = () => {
                    if (window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) return;
                    clearSelectionAndBlur(input);
                    window.__nativeSelectionInput = null;
                };

                const selectAllForNativeMenu = () => {
                    if (window.__nativeSelectionInput && window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) {
                        try { clearSelectionAndBlur(window.__nativeSelectionInput); } catch (e) {}
                    }

                    window.__nativeSelectionInput = input;
                    focusForEditing();

                    try {
                        const valueLength = (input.value || '').length;
                        if (typeof input.setSelectionRange === 'function') {
                            input.setSelectionRange(0, valueLength);
                        } else if (typeof input.select === 'function') {
                            input.select();
                        }
                    } catch (e) {}

                    forceNativeSelectionUI();
                    setTimeout(forceNativeSelectionUI, 30);
                    setTimeout(forceNativeSelectionUI, 120);
                };

                input.addEventListener('focus', () => {
                    if (window.__nativeSelectionInput && window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) {
                        try { clearSelectionAndBlur(window.__nativeSelectionInput); } catch (e) {}
                        window.__nativeSelectionInput = null;
                    }
                    focusForEditing();
                });

                input.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    if (window.__nativeSelectionInput && window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) {
                        try { clearSelectionAndBlur(window.__nativeSelectionInput); } catch (e) {}
                        window.__nativeSelectionInput = null;
                    }
                    focusForEditing();
                });

                input.addEventListener('dblclick', selectAllForNativeMenu);
                input.addEventListener('contextmenu', focusForEditing);

                input.addEventListener('input', () => {
                  if (input.id !== 'dragon-modal-username') return;

                  const value = input.value || '';
                  if (!value) return;

                  const newValue = value.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + value.slice(1);

                  if (newValue !== value) {
                  const start = input.selectionStart;
                  const end = input.selectionEnd;
                  input.value = newValue;

                  try {
                    input.setSelectionRange(start, end);
                  } catch (e) {}
                  }
                });

                input.addEventListener('blur', clearOwnSelection);

                document.addEventListener('selectionchange', () => {
                    try {
                        if (window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) return;
                        const start = typeof input.selectionStart === 'number' ? input.selectionStart : 0;
                        const end = typeof input.selectionEnd === 'number' ? input.selectionEnd : 0;
                        if (start === end) {
                            clearOwnSelection();
                        }
                    } catch (e) {}
                });

                document.addEventListener('pointerdown', (event) => {
                    if (window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) return;
                    if (event.target !== input) {
                        clearOwnSelection();
                    }
                }, true);
            });
        }

        function startAutoConnection() {
            isAutoConnecting = true;
            currentConfigIndex = 0;
            autoConnectConfigs = Array.isArray(filteredAutoConnectConfigs) ? filteredAutoConnectConfigs.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name, 'pt-BR')) : [];

            if (autoConnectConfigs.length === 0) {
                showToast("Nenhuma configuração selecionada para testar.");
                isAutoConnecting = false;
                return;
            }

            document.getElementById('auto-connect-start-btn').disabled = true;
            document.getElementById('auto-connect-cancel-btn').textContent = 'Parar';
            document.querySelectorAll('#auto-connect-category-filter .category-chip').forEach(chip => chip.style.pointerEvents = 'none');
            const logContainer = document.getElementById('auto-connect-logs');
            logContainer.innerHTML = '';
            addAutoConnectLog("Iniciando conexão automática...");
            tryNextConfig();
        }

        function tryNextConfig() {
            if (!isAutoConnecting || currentConfigIndex >= autoConnectConfigs.length) {
                if (isAutoConnecting) {
                    addAutoConnectLog("Fim dos testes. Nenhum conectou.");
                    showToast("Não foi possível conectar em nenhuma opção");
                }
                isAutoConnecting = false;
                resetAutoConnectModal();
                window?.DtExecuteVpnStop?.execute();
                return;
            }

            connectionTimedOut = false;
            const config = autoConnectConfigs[currentConfigIndex];
            const firstConfigNameEl = document.getElementById('first-config-name');
            if (firstConfigNameEl) {
                firstConfigNameEl.textContent = config.name;
            }

            window?.DtSetConfig?.execute(config.id);
            addAutoConnectLog(`Testando: ${config.name}`);
            window?.DtExecuteVpnStart?.execute();

            connectionTimeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
                if (!isAutoConnecting) return;
                connectionTimedOut = true;
                window?.DtExecuteVpnStop?.execute();
            }, 8000);
        }

        const normalizeTheme = (theme) => {

            if (defaultMode === 'light' || defaultMode === 'dark') {

            if (!themeToggle) return;
            const icon = themeToggle.querySelector('i');

            const subtitle = themeToggle.querySelector('p');

            if (theme === 'dark') {
                if (icon) icon.className = 'fas fa-sun';
                if (title) title.textContent = 'Modo Claro';
                if (subtitle) subtitle.textContent = 'Alternar para claro';
            } else {
                if (icon) icon.className = 'fas fa-moon';
                if (title) title.textContent = 'Modo Escuro';
                if (subtitle) subtitle.textContent = 'Alternar para escuro';
            }
        };

        let themeSwitchRaf = 0;

        const setTheme = (theme, save = true) => {
            body.classList.add('theme-switching');

            applyTheme(theme);
            updateThemeToggleUI(theme);
            updateStatusBarColor(theme);

            if (save) {
                localStorage.setItem(THEME_STORAGE_KEY, theme);
            }

            if (themeSwitchRaf) cancelAnimationFrame(themeSwitchRaf);
            themeSwitchRaf = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                body.classList.remove('theme-switching');
                themeSwitchRaf = 0;
            });
        };

        function isMenuBlockVisible(menuItemId) {
  const item = document.getElementById(menuItemId);
  if (!item) return false;

  const wrapper = item.parentElement;
  if (!wrapper) return false;

  const wrapperStyle = window.getComputedStyle(wrapper);
  const itemStyle = window.getComputedStyle(item);

  return wrapperStyle.display !== "none" && itemStyle.display !== "none";
}

function updateExtraMenuDivider() {
  const divider = document.getElementById("menu-divider-extra");
  if (!divider) return;

  const shouldShow =
    isMenuBlockVisible("nav-suporte") ||
    isMenuBlockVisible("nav-renovar") ||
    isMenuBlockVisible("nav-teste");

  divider.style.display = shouldShow ? "block" : "none";
}

    updateExtraMenuDivider();
  });

  targets.forEach(target => {
    observer.observe(target, {
      attributes: true,
      attributeFilter: ["style", "class"]
    });
  });
});

            function enableAndroidTextActions(selector) {
                if (typeof window.__nativeSelectionInput === 'undefined') {
                    window.__nativeSelectionInput = null;
                }
                const hideNativeSelection = () => {};
                const clearSelectionAndBlur = (input) => {
                    try {
                        const end = (input.value || '').length;
                        if (typeof input.setSelectionRange === 'function') {
                            input.setSelectionRange(end, end);
                        }
                    } catch (e) {}

                    try {
                        const sel = window.getSelection && window.getSelection();
                        if (sel && typeof sel.removeAllRanges === 'function') {
                            sel.removeAllRanges();
                        }
                    } catch (e) {}

                    try { input.blur(); } catch (e) {}

                window.quickTextPanelController = {
                    show() {},

                };

                document.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach((input) => {
                    input.setAttribute('autocomplete', 'on');
                    input.setAttribute('autocapitalize', 'off');
                    input.setAttribute('spellcheck', 'false');

                                                                                input.removeAttribute('readonly');
                    input.removeAttribute('disabled');

                    const focusForEditing = () => {
                        try {
                                                                                                                input.focus({ preventScroll: true });
                        } catch (e) {
                            try { input.focus(); } catch (_) {}
                        }
                    };

                    const clearOwnSelection = () => {
                        if (window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) return;
                        clearSelectionAndBlur(input);
                        window.__nativeSelectionInput = null;
                    };

                    const clearOwnSelectionKeepFocus = () => {
                        if (window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) return;

                        try {
                            const end = (input.value || '').length;
                            if (typeof input.setSelectionRange === 'function') {
                                input.setSelectionRange(end, end);
                            }
                        } catch (e) {}

                        try {
                            const sel = window.getSelection && window.getSelection();
                            if (sel && typeof sel.removeAllRanges === 'function') {
                                sel.removeAllRanges();
                            }
                        } catch (e) {}

                        window.__nativeSelectionInput = null;
                        focusForEditing();
                    };

                    const forceNativeSelectionUI = () => {
                        try {
                                                                                                            } catch (e) {}

                        try { input.focus({ preventScroll: true }); } catch (e) {
                            try { input.focus(); } catch (_) {}
                        }

                        try {
                            const valueLength = (input.value || '').length;
                            if (typeof input.setSelectionRange === 'function') {
                                input.setSelectionRange(0, valueLength);
                            } else if (typeof input.select === 'function') {
                                input.select();
                            }
                        } catch (e) {}

                        try { input.click(); } catch (e) {}
                        try { input.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, view: window })); } catch (e) {}
                        try { input.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseup', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, view: window })); } catch (e) {}
                        try { input.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, view: window })); } catch (e) {}
                        try { input.dispatchEvent(new Event('selectionchange', { bubbles: true })); } catch (e) {}
                    };

                    const selectAllForNativeMenu = () => {
                        if (window.__nativeSelectionInput && window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) {
                            try { clearSelectionAndBlur(window.__nativeSelectionInput); } catch (e) {}
                        }

                        window.__nativeSelectionInput = input;
                        focusForEditing();

                        try {
                            const value = input.value || '';
                            const valueLength = value.length;

                            if (valueLength > 0) {
                                if (typeof input.setSelectionRange === 'function') {
                                    input.setSelectionRange(0, valueLength);
                                } else if (typeof input.select === 'function') {
                                    input.select();
                                }
                            } else if (typeof input.setSelectionRange === 'function') {
                                input.setSelectionRange(0, 0);
                            }
                        } catch (e) {}

                                                                        
                        forceNativeSelectionUI();
                        requestAnimationFrame(forceNativeSelectionUI);
                        setTimeout(forceNativeSelectionUI, 25);
                        setTimeout(forceNativeSelectionUI, 80);
                        setTimeout(forceNativeSelectionUI, 160);
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            try { input.focus({ preventScroll: true }); } catch (e) { try { input.focus(); } catch (err) {} }
                            try { input.click(); } catch (e) {}
                        }, 220);
                    };

                    input.addEventListener('focus', () => {
                        if (window.__nativeSelectionInput && window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) {
                            try { clearSelectionAndBlur(window.__nativeSelectionInput); } catch (e) {}
                            window.__nativeSelectionInput = null;
                        }
                        focusForEditing();
                    });

                    input.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        if (window.__nativeSelectionInput === input) {
                            clearOwnSelectionKeepFocus();
                            return;
                        }

                        if (window.__nativeSelectionInput && window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) {
                            try { clearSelectionAndBlur(window.__nativeSelectionInput); } catch (e) {}
                            window.__nativeSelectionInput = null;
                        }
                        focusForEditing();
                    });

                    let nativePressTimer = null;
                    let nativePressStarted = false;
                    let nativeLongPressTriggered = false;
                    let nativeStartX = 0;
                    let nativeStartY = 0;

                    const cancelNativePressTimer = () => {
                        if (nativePressTimer) {
                            clearTimeout(nativePressTimer);
                            nativePressTimer = null;
                        }
                    };

                    const startNativeLongPress = (clientX, clientY) => {
                        cancelNativePressTimer();
                        nativePressStarted = true;
                        nativeLongPressTriggered = false;
                        nativeStartX = Number(clientX) || 0;
                        nativeStartY = Number(clientY) || 0;

                        nativePressTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                            nativeLongPressTriggered = true;
                            selectAllForNativeMenu();
                            setTimeout(forceNativeSelectionUI, 10);
                            setTimeout(forceNativeSelectionUI, 40);
                        }, 220);
                    };

                    const maybeCancelNativeLongPressByMove = (clientX, clientY) => {
                        if (!nativePressStarted || nativeLongPressTriggered) return;
                        const dx = Math.abs((Number(clientX) || 0) - nativeStartX);
                        const dy = Math.abs((Number(clientY) || 0) - nativeStartY);
                        if (dx > 10 || dy > 10) {
                            cancelNativePressTimer();
                        }
                    };

                    const finishNativeLongPress = () => {
                        if (!nativeLongPressTriggered) {
                            cancelNativePressTimer();
                            focusForEditing();
                        }
                        nativePressStarted = false;
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            nativeLongPressTriggered = false;
                        }, 0);
                    };


                    const resetNativePressState = () => {
                        cancelNativePressTimer();
                        nativePressStarted = false;
                        nativeLongPressTriggered = false;
                    };

                    if (window.PointerEvent) {
                        input.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e) => {
                            if (e.pointerType === 'touch' || e.pointerType === 'pen') {
                                startNativeLongPress(e.clientX, e.clientY);
                            }
                        }, { passive: true });

                        input.addEventListener('pointermove', (e) => {
                            if (e.pointerType === 'touch' || e.pointerType === 'pen') {
                                maybeCancelNativeLongPressByMove(e.clientX, e.clientY);
                            }
                        }, { passive: true });

                        input.addEventListener('pointerup', finishNativeLongPress, { passive: true });
                        input.addEventListener('pointercancel', resetNativePressState, { passive: true });
                    } else {
                        input.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
                            const touch = e.touches && e.touches[0];
                            startNativeLongPress(touch ? touch.clientX : 0, touch ? touch.clientY : 0);
                        }, { passive: true });

                        input.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
                            const touch = e.touches && e.touches[0];
                            maybeCancelNativeLongPressByMove(touch ? touch.clientX : 0, touch ? touch.clientY : 0);
                        }, { passive: true });

                        input.addEventListener('touchend', finishNativeLongPress, { passive: true });
                        input.addEventListener('touchcancel', resetNativePressState, { passive: true });
                    }

                    input.addEventListener('contextmenu', () => {
                        focusForEditing();
                    });

                    input.addEventListener('input', () => {
                                            });

                    input.addEventListener('blur', () => {
                        cancelNativePressTimer();
                        nativePressStarted = false;
                        nativeLongPressTriggered = false;
                        clearOwnSelection();
                    });

                    document.addEventListener('selectionchange', () => {
                        try {
                            if (window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) return;
                            if (document.activeElement !== input) {
                                clearOwnSelection();
                                return;
                            }

                            const start = typeof input.selectionStart === 'number' ? input.selectionStart : 0;
                            const end = typeof input.selectionEnd === 'number' ? input.selectionEnd : 0;

                            if (start !== end) {
                                requestAnimationFrame(forceNativeSelectionUI);
                            }
                        } catch (e) {}
                    }, true);

                    const closeIfOutside = (event) => {
                        if (window.__nativeSelectionInput !== input) return;
                        const target = event.target;
                        if (target !== input) {
                            clearOwnSelection();
                        }
                    };

                    document.addEventListener('pointerdown', closeIfOutside, true);
                    document.addEventListener('touchstart', closeIfOutside, true);
                    document.addEventListener('mousedown', closeIfOutside, true);
                    document.addEventListener('focusin', closeIfOutside, true);
                    document.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
                        if (window.__nativeSelectionInput === input) {
                            clearOwnSelection();
                        }
                    }, true);
                });
            }

            enableAndroidTextActions('#dragonLoginModal input, #dragonLoginModal textarea');
            
            const savedUserForProfile = window?.DtUsername?.get() || '';
            if (savedUserForProfile) {
                const profileName = document.querySelector('.navbar-profile h4');
                const profileEmail = document.querySelector('.navbar-profile p');
                if (profileName) profileName.textContent = savedUserForProfile;
                if (profileEmail) profileEmail.textContent = 'Usuário Autenticado';
            }

            const navHostshareItem = document.getElementById('nav-hostshare');
            if (navHostshareItem && !hostshareUrl) {
                navHostshareItem.style.display = 'none';
            }

            const setColorTheme = (theme) => {
                document.body.dataset.colorTheme = theme;
                localStorage.setItem('colorTheme', theme);

                document.querySelectorAll('.theme-swatch').forEach(swatch => {
                    swatch.classList.remove('active');
                });

                const activeSwatch = document.querySelector(`.theme-swatch[data-theme="${theme}"]`);
                if (activeSwatch) activeSwatch.classList.add('active');
            };

            document.querySelectorAll('.theme-swatch').forEach(swatch => {
                swatch.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    setColorTheme(swatch.dataset.theme);
                });
            });

            const savedColorTheme = localStorage.getItem('colorTheme') || defaultColorTheme;
            setColorTheme(savedColorTheme);
            applyNotificationGradient(savedColorTheme);

            updateSelectedServerInfo();
            startNetInfoSync();
            dtVpnStateListener(window?.DtGetVpnState?.execute() ?? 'DISCONNECTED');
            window?.dtOnNewLogListener?.();

            function setupUserDetailsDrag() {
                const userDetails = document.querySelector('.user-info-container .user-details');
                if (!userDetails) return;

                let isDown = false;
                let startX;
                let scrollLeft;

                userDetails.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                    isDown = true;
                    userDetails.classList.add('dragging');
                    startX = e.pageX - userDetails.offsetLeft;
                    scrollLeft = userDetails.scrollLeft;
                });

                userDetails.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                    isDown = false;
                    userDetails.classList.remove('dragging');
                });

                userDetails.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
                    isDown = false;
                    userDetails.classList.remove('dragging');
                });

                userDetails.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                    if (!isDown) return;
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const x = e.pageX - userDetails.offsetLeft;
                    const walk = (x - startX) * 2;
                    userDetails.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walk;
                });

                userDetails.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
                    isDown = true;
                    userDetails.classList.add('dragging');
                    startX = e.touches[0].pageX - userDetails.offsetLeft;
                    scrollLeft = userDetails.scrollLeft;
                }, {
                    passive: true
                });

                userDetails.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
                    isDown = false;
                    userDetails.classList.remove('dragging');
                });

                userDetails.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
                    if (!isDown) return;
                    const x = e.touches[0].pageX - userDetails.offsetLeft;
                    const walk = (x - startX) * 2;
                    userDetails.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walk;
                }, {
                    passive: true
                });
            }

            setupUserDetailsDrag();

            const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {
                mutations.forEach(mutation => {
                    if (mutation.type === 'childList' &&
                        (mutation.target.classList.contains('user-info-container') ||
                            mutation.target.querySelector('.user-details'))) {
                        setupUserDetailsDrag();
                    }
                });
            });

            const userInfoContainer = document.querySelector('.user-info-container');
            if (userInfoContainer) {
                observer.observe(userInfoContainer, {
                    childList: true,
                    subtree: true
                });
            }
        });


        if (!window.DtGetVpnState) {
            console.log("Mocking DT API for browser testing.");
            let mockState = 'DISCONNECTED';
            const states = ['CONNECTING', 'CONNECTED'];
            let currentStateIndex = 0;

            window.DtGetVpnState = {
                execute: () => mockState
            };
            window.DtExecuteVpnStart = {
                execute: () => {
                    mockState = states[0];
                    dtVpnStateListener(mockState);
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        mockState = states[1];
                        dtVpnStateListener(mockState);
                    }, 2000);
                }
            };
            window.DtExecuteVpnStop = {
                execute: () => {
                    mockState = 'STOPPING';
                    dtVpnStateListener(mockState);
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        mockState = 'DISCONNECTED';
                        dtVpnStateListener(mockState);
                    }, 1000);
                }
            };
            window.DtGetLocalIP = {
                execute: () => '127.0.0.1'
            };
            window.DtGetPingResult = {
                execute: () => '10ms'
            };
            window.DtGetConfigs = {
                execute: () => MOCK_CONFIGS
            };
            window.DtSetConfig = {
                execute: (id) => console.log(`Config set to ${id}`)
            };
            window.DtStartCheckUser = {
                execute: () => {
                    window.dtCheckUserStartedListener();
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        window.dtCheckUserModelListener(JSON.stringify({
                            username: 'mock_user',
                            expiration_date: '2025-12-31',
                            expiration_days: '365',
                            count_connections: '1',
                            limit_connections: '2'
                        }));
                    }, 1000);
                }
            };
            window.DtStartWebViewActivity = {
                execute: (url) => {
                    console.log(`Opening WebView: ${url}`);
                    showToast(`Abrindo...`)
                }
            };
            window.DtGetLogs = {
                execute: () => JSON.stringify([{
                    '[INFO]': 'Mock log entry 1'
                }, {
                    '[DEBUG]': 'Another mock log entry'
                }])
            };
            window.DtStartAppUpdate = {
                execute: () => console.log('Checking for app updates...')
            };
            window.DtUsername = {
                get: () => localStorage.getItem('mockUser') || '',
                set: (val) => localStorage.setItem('mockUser', val)
            };
            window.DtPassword = {
                get: () => localStorage.getItem('mockPass') || '',
                set: (val) => localStorage.setItem('mockPass', val)
            };
            window.DtUuid = {
                get: () => localStorage.getItem('mockUuid') || '',
                set: (val) => localStorage.setItem('mockUuid', val)
            };
            window.DtClearLogs = {
                execute: () => console.log('Logs cleared.')
            };

            let mockHotspotState = 'INACTIVE';
            window.DtGetStatusHotSpotService = {
                execute: () => mockHotspotState
            };
            window.DtStartHotSpotService = {
                execute: () => {
                    console.log('Starting hotspot service...');
                    mockHotspotState = 'ACTIVE';
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        window.onHotspotStateListener('ACTIVE');
                    }, 1000);
                }
            };
            window.DtStopHotSpotService = {
                execute: () => {
                    console.log('Stopping hotspot service...');
                    mockHotspotState = 'INACTIVE';
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        window.onHotspotStateListener('INACTIVE');
                    }, 1000);
                }
            };

            let mockCurrentConfig = JSON.parse(MOCK_CONFIGS)[0].items[0];

            try {
                const savedConfig = localStorage.getItem('mockCurrentConfig');
                if (savedConfig) {
                    mockCurrentConfig = JSON.parse(savedConfig);
                }
            } catch (e) {}

            window.DtGetDefaultConfig = {
                execute: () => JSON.stringify(mockCurrentConfig)
            };

            const originalDtSetConfig = window.DtSetConfig;
            if (!originalDtSetConfig) {
                window.DtSetConfig = {
                    execute: (id) => {
                        console.log(`Config set to ${id}`);
                        const allConfigs = JSON.parse(MOCK_CONFIGS);
                        for (const category of allConfigs) {
                            const found = category.items.find(item => item.id === id);
                            if (found) {
                                mockCurrentConfig = found;
                                localStorage.setItem('mockCurrentConfig', JSON.stringify(mockCurrentConfig));
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                };
            } else {
                const originalExecute = originalDtSetConfig.execute;
                window.DtSetConfig.execute = (id) => {
                    originalExecute(id);
                    const allConfigs = JSON.parse(MOCK_CONFIGS);
                    for (const category of allConfigs) {
                        const found = category.items.find(item => item.id === id);
                        if (found) {
                            mockCurrentConfig = found;
                            localStorage.setItem('mockCurrentConfig', JSON.stringify(mockCurrentConfig));
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                };
            }
        }

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
            const saved = localStorage.getItem("checkUserData");
            if (saved) {
                window.dtCheckUserModelListener(saved);
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
            const status = window?.DtGetStatusHotSpotService?.execute();
            if (status) {
                currentHotspotState = status.toUpperCase();
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
            const serverNameEl = document.querySelector('.server-info span');
            const serverFlagEl = document.querySelector('.server-info img');
            const serverDescEl = document.querySelector('.server-info small');
            const select = document.querySelector(".server-select");

            const savedServerId = localStorage.getItem("selectedServerId");
            if (!savedServerId) {
                if (serverNameEl) serverNameEl.textContent = "Selecionar Operadora";
                if (serverFlagEl) serverFlagEl.src = "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/1040/1040221.png";
                if (serverDescEl) serverDescEl.textContent = "Clique aqui";
            }

            select.addEventListener("click", () => {
                showConfigsModal();
            });
        });

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
            showToast('Verificando atualização...');

            setTimeout(() => {
                window?.DtStartAppUpdate?.execute();
                showToast('Aplicativo atualizado ✅');
            }, 3000);
        });

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
            const savedUser = localStorage.getItem("savedUser");
            const usernameDisplay = document.getElementById("info-username");

            if (savedUser && usernameDisplay) {
                usernameDisplay.textContent = "Olá, " + savedUser;
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
            document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
                if (e.key === "F12") {e.preventDefault();}
                if (e.ctrlKey && e.shiftKey && e.key === "I") {e.preventDefault();}
                if (e.ctrlKey && e.shiftKey && e.key === "J") {e.preventDefault();}
                if (e.ctrlKey && e.key === "U") {e.preventDefault();}
            });

            document.addEventListener("contextmenu", function(e) {
                const target = e.target;
                const isEditable = target && (
                    target.closest('#dragonLoginModal') ||
                    target.tagName === 'INPUT' ||
                    target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' ||
                    target.isContentEditable
                );

                if (isEditable) {
                    return;
                }

                e.preventDefault();
            });
        });
    </script>
